encounter.reason: quarterly follow-up, winter seasonal mood assessment
encounter.location: Puget Sound Psychiatry, 1001 4th Ave, Suite 820, Seattle, WA 98154

conditions.name: alcohol use disorder, moderate severity, in sustained remission

medications.name: lamotrigine 200 mg oral tablet
medications.sig: Take 200 mg by mouth once daily

medications.name: quetiapine 50 mg oral tablet
medications.sig: Take 50 mg by mouth at bedtime
medications.reason: bipolar II disorder (sleep and mood stabilization)

medications.name: naltrexone 50 mg oral tablet
medications.sig: Take 50 mg by mouth once daily

document_references.description: Quarterly psychiatric follow-up note documenting winter seasonal mood assessment for patient with bipolar II disorder. Reports brief self-limited low motivation episode in January that did not meet depressive episode criteria, continued use of light therapy and seasonal coping strategies, stable mood on current regimen, sustained sobriety approaching 2 years, and PHQ-9/GAD-7 screening scores at baseline. No medication changes; plan for lamotrigine level and metabolic panel at next visit.
